title: When you realize that you’re the senior dev now.
summary: A YouTube video from Google for Developers featuring Pete King discussing the experience of becoming a senior developer. The video uses humor to reflect on career advancement in software development.
writeup: Google for Developers features Pete King in a short, humorous reflection on what it means to become the senior developer on a team. The video uses comedy to frame the experience of career advancement in software development. The takeaway is a lighthearted look at the shift in role and responsibility that comes with seniority.
